'''SonTag''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Meerian/Legends|Meerian]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]] in [[45 BBY/Legends|45 BBY]]. A calm leader, she was a supporter of the [[Home Planet Party]] and its leader [[VeerTa]]. However, she was forced to arrest the party leader after finding out that VeerTa had unintentionally helped the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Xanatos]] in his plan to destroy the planet.

{{Char-stub}}
